Uses of Annotation Interface
org.apache.juneau.http.Path

Packages that use Path
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.server.config.rest
Server Configuration REST

    Views the contents of a file.

    LogsResource.viewParsedEntries(RestRequest req, String path, String start, String end, String thread, String[] loggers, String[] severity)
    Views the parsed contents of a log file with filtering.

    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest with annotations of type Path
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PetStoreResource.deleteOrder(long id)
    Deletes an order by ID.
    void
    PetStoreResource.deletePet(long id)
    Deletes a pet by ID.
    void
    PetStoreResource.deleteUser(String username)
    Deletes a user by username.
    Order
    PetStoreResource.getOrder(long id)
    Retrieves an order by ID.
    Pet
    PetSecureResource.getPet(long id)
    Retrieves a pet by ID.
    Pet
    PetStoreResource.getPet(long id)
    Retrieves a pet by ID.
    User
    PetStoreResource.getUser(String username)
    Retrieves a user by username.
    Order
    PetStoreResource.updateOrder(long id, Order order)
    Updates an existing order.
    Pet
    PetStoreResource.updatePet(long id, Pet pet)
    Updates an existing pet.
    User
    PetStoreResource.updateUser(String username, User user)
    Updates an existing user.
    View
    PetFreemarkerViewResource.viewPet(long id)
    GET /pets/{id}/view — renders a pet detail HTML page through FreeMarker.
    View
    PetMustacheViewResource.viewPet(long id)
    GET /pets/{id}/view — renders a pet detail HTML page through Mustache.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    LoggersMixin.getLogger(RestRequest req, String name)
    [GET /loggers/{name}] - One logger's configured level.
    String
    LoggersResource.getLogger(RestRequest req, String name)
    [GET /{name}] - One logger's configured level.
    String
    LoggersMixin.setLogger(RestRequest req, String name, String level)
    [PUT /loggers/{name}] - Set a logger's level at runtime.
    String
    LoggersResource.setLogger(RestRequest req, String name, String level)
    [PUT /{name}] - Set a logger's level at runtime.
    String
    LoggersMixin.setLoggerPost(RestRequest req, String name, String level)
    [POST /loggers/{name}] - Set a logger's level at runtime (POST alias of LoggersMixin.setLogger(RestRequest,String,String)).
    String
    LoggersResource.setLoggerPost(RestRequest req, String name, String level)
    [POST /{name}] - Set a logger's level at runtime (POST alias of LoggersResource.setLogger(RestRequest,String,String)).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    StaticFilesMixin.getStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /static/*] — serve a static file from the active StaticFiles bean.

    StaticFilesResource.getStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /*] — serve a static file from the active StaticFiles worker bean.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesServlet.getStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /*] — serve a static file from the active StaticFiles worker bean.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesMixin.headStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [HEAD /static/*] — return GET headers for a static file without the body.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesResource.headStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [HEAD /*] — return GET headers for a static file without the body.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesServlet.headStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [HEAD /*] — return GET headers for a static file without the body.

    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view with annotations of type Path
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ViewResource.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — render the raw template identified by the trailing path under this child's subtree mount.
    void
    ViewServlet.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — render the raw template identified by the trailing path under this servlet's sibling top-level mount.
